summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. #88323 has a concrete replacement-fix path because the useful source branch is uneditable and still blocked; #88400, #88401, and #73163 look small and mostly clean but cannot be recommended for merge without a complete merge preflight and maintainer review; #69729 remains blocked by failing proof/checks plus unresolved review findings and author-followup state.
